steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank describes a quality that the word "life" has in written English. The evidence is that "life" is the ninth most commonly used noun — so the blank needs a word meaning very frequent or widespread.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘ubiquitous’: means present or found everywhere — fits a word ranked ninth most common. ✓
  • Choice B — ‘authoritative’: relates to credibility or expertise, not frequency. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘diminishing’: means declining — contradicts the high ranking shown. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘misused’: means used incorrectly — the passage says nothing about incorrect usage. ✗
That confirms A is correct.
